title: The Grid SMP Official Modpack
description: Recommended mods & configuration for The Grid SMP.
body:
## Official GSMP Modpack
This modpack is aimed to be the perfect modpack for The Grid SMP with various performance improvements, rendering fixes and QoL changes.
We also recommend downloading OST resourcepacks from the Discord [here](https://discord.com/channels/622463412290453504/1107014906789773372)!

<details>
  <summary>Included mods</summary>

- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers] by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw)
- [Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica) by [FoundationGames](https://modrinth.com/user/FoundationGames)
- [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds) by [Motschen](https://modrinth.com/user/Motschen)
- [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) by [Lortseam](https://modrinth.com/user/Lortseam)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) by [Johni0702](https://modrinth.com/user/Johni0702)
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) by [caelthecolher](https://modrinth.com/user/caelthecolher)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) by [shedaniel](https://modrinth.com/user/shedaniel)
- [Command Macros](https://modrinth.com/mod/command-macros) by [kryptonaught](https://modrinth.com/user/kyrptonaught)
- [C2M](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) by [ishland](https://modrinth.com/user/ishland)
- [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify) by [isxander](https://modrinth.com/user/isxander)
- [Cull Less Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-less-leaves) by [isxander](https://modrinth.com/user/isxander)
- [Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) by [isxander](https://modrinth.com/user/isxander)
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) by [juliand665](https://modrinth.com/user/juliand665)
- [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) by [Traben](https://modrinth.com/user/Traben)
- [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) by [Traben](https://modrinth.com/user/Traben)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw)
- [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by [modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/user/modmuss50)
- [Fabric Skyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) by [AMereBagatelle](https://modrinth.com/user/AMereBagatelle)
- [Fabric Skyboxes Interop](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes-interop) by [FlasyReese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese)
- [Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot) by [ramidzkh](https://modrinth.com/user/ramidzkh)
- [Fadeless](https://modrinth.com/mod/fadeless) by [DerpDerpling](https://modrinth.com/user/DerpDerpling)
- [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by [malte0811](https://modrinth.com/user/malte0811)
...and [many](https://modrinth.com/modpack/gsmp-official/version/1.0.0-alpha-1) more!
</details>
